mapper.insert: insert into items_param (id, item_id, produc_place, foot_period, brand, factory_name, factory_address, packaging_method, weight, storage_method, eat_method, created_time, updated_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{producPlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{footPeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brand,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{factoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{factoryAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packagingMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storageMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eatMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update items_param set item_id = #{itemId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, produc_place = #{producPlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, foot_period = #{footPeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, brand = #{brand,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, factory_name = #{factoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, factory_address = #{factoryAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, packaging_method = #{packagingMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, storage_method = #{storageMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, eat_method = #{eatMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select id, item_id, produc_place, foot_period, brand, factory_name, factory_address, packaging_method, weight, storage_method, eat_method, created_time, updated_time from items_param where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select id, item_id, produc_place, foot_period, brand, factory_name, factory_address, packaging_method, weight, storage_method, eat_method, created_time, updated_time from items_param
